global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with a food delivery app interface and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting quick dinner options at a low price.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A vibrant red background fills the entire canvas, providing a bold and eye-catching base for the ad.

elements.label: Food delivery app interface

elements.description: Another rectangular screen with rounded corners, displaying additional food options or details.

elements.label: Additional information text
elements.description: Smaller text positioned within the app interface, providing extra details about the food delivery service.

elements.label: Main promotional message
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Dinner in minutes' with a playful font, prominently displayed in the center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Late-night deals available $4.99 Learn more

elements.label: App logo
elements.description: A simple logo for 'QuickFork', featuring a stylized font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold text, designed to attract attention.
